description.content: Virtual machine lifecycle and metadata.
Fetches a list of machines visible to the caller's team.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Provisions a new Paperspace machine in the specified region with the chosen machine type and template.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Fetches a single machine by ID.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Updates a machine — name, auto-shutdown, public IP, machine type, and other mutable fields.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Deletes a single machine by ID and releases the associated resources.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Starts a stopped machine.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Stops a running machine — compute billing pauses; storage continues to bill.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Retrieves desktop streaming configuration settings used by the Paperspace client.

Machine-event history stream.
Fetches a page of machine events across the team.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Team-member access grants on individual machines.
Lists team members with explicit access to the machine.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Grants machine access to a team member.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Retrieves accessor information for a specific user.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Region/availability lookups for machine types.
Gets the machine availability for a given region and machine type.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Programmatic management of Paperspace virtual machines — GPU and CPU compute
instances offered by Paperspace (now part of DigitalOcean). The Machines API
covers lifecycle (create, start, stop, restart, delete), team access,
desktop streaming configuration, and the machine-events stream. Authenticate
with a team-scoped API key as `Authorization: Bearer $API_TOKEN`.


Contact Support:
 Name: Paperspace Support
